case_title: TANIA ALVAREZ ET AL VS. VLAD CHERNOGOZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS WERE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,812.73 FILED BY ALVAREZ, TANIA ALCANTAR, DINA AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOGOZ, VLAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-18-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES (2) BY PLAINTIFFS, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT MADE IN FULL W/INTEREST AND IN CASH AT CLERK'S WINDOW) AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOGOZ, VLAD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL C FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, TANIA ALCANTAR, DINA AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOGOZ, VLAD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED AUG-18-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOGOZ, VLAD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, TANIA ALCANTAR, DINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHERNOGOZ, VLAD $39.94 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $204.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0615B19D003, TAG # 033688 PAYMENT MADE IN CASH; (PRINCIPLE:39.94 + COSTS:165.00 + INTEREST INCURRED AFTER JUDGMENT UNTIL PAYMENT:$1.18 = $206.12) BY DEFENDANT CHERNOGOZ, VLAD
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT CHERNOGOZ, VLAD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.
